trackingsummarydata.subject: Bendable solar panels, read-aloud "Iliad" and John Cameron Mitchell
trackingsummarydata.title: FSSG - 03/03/25

urls.page_title: War, love and loyalty: The ‘Iliad’ in Ithaca on March 12-13
urls.page_summary: An event with translator Emily Wilson and a daylong community reading of portions of Homer’s epic poem highlighted the Arts Unplugged event.
urls.page_title: Dialogic & Deep Listening Session on the Life and Music of Alice Coltrane - Cornell
urls.page_summary:
Featured guest Professor Stephon Alexander & Assistant Professor, Ambre Dromgoole.
Stephon Alexander, Professor of Physics at Brown University, is a renowned theoretical physicist, author, and jazz musician. His research bridges cosmology, partic...
urls.page_title: Solar solutions: Bio-inspired approach creates bespoke photovoltaics | Cornell Chronicle
urls.page_summary: An interdisciplinary team of Cornell researchers is developing HelioSkin, an aesthetically appealing solar-collection fabric that is inspired by the biological mechanisms that enable plants to bend toward the sun.

Image: © Trevor Paglen, Symbology, Volume III (2009). Courtesy of the Artist, Altman Siegel, San Francisco and Pace Gallery.

urls.page_title: Is Fat Female? Evolution, Feminism, and Getting the Story Right - Cornell
urls.page_summary:
Associate Professor Kate Manne and Dr. Cat Bohannon Discuss Female Body Image and Evolution
Just in time for International Women’s Day, Prof. Kate Manne, author of “Unshrinking: How to Face Fatphobia,” and Cat Bohannon, New York Times bestselling...
Awards and honors received by faculty, postdocs and graduate students in the College of Arts & Sciences.
urls.page_title: Remembering William Kennedy, professor emeritus in comparative literature
urls.page_summary: Kennedy taught the history of European literature and literary criticism from antiquity to the early modern period.
urls.page_title: Remembering Molly Hite, professor emerita of English
urls.page_summary: Hite taught at Cornell from 1982 until her retirement in 2013.
urls.page_title: PMA Presents: An Evening with John Cameron Mitchell, Carol B. Epstein Guest Artist | Performing and Media Arts
urls.page_summary: Join the Department of Performing and Media Arts for an Evening with John Cameron Mitchell, Carol B. Epstein Guest Artist. The event will take place on Friday, March 7, at 6:30 PM in the Schwartz Center for the Performing Arts. The evening will fe...
